title: RAPID REHOUSING - 211info
text: PEER HOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER RAPID REHOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Registration and referral for Oregon Health Plan's Health Related Social Needs program. Case Managers provide housing barrier assessments, work with Housing Navigators and outside agencies offering support and financial assistance to cover rental application fees, rental deposits, and moving costs. 16389 Highway 101 S Brookings, OR 97415 Eligibility: Unhoused individuals and families Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Email (541) 251-0825 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 251-0825 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: Curry County Services: Moving Expense Assistance * Homelessness Issues Rental Deposit Assistance * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - PEER HOUSE DONATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RESOURCE NAVIGATION MATERIAL GOODS - PEER HOUSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PEER HOUSE NAVIGATION CENTER
